title: caladenia interanea
side_effects: Caladenia interanea can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and skin irritation. Overconsumption of the plant's extracts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while external application can cause redness, itching, and swelling of the skin. Prolonged exposure to the plant's compounds can also disrupt normal hormonal balance, causing symptoms like insomnia, anxiety, and mood swings. In severe cases, improper use of Caladenia interanea can even trigger allergic shock or anaphylaxis in sensitive individuals.
